name: tlon
description: Tlon Messenger connector — bridges Tlon peer-to-peer chat messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Urbit ship names allowed to interact (e.g. ~zod)

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Tlon group/channel paths to process messages from
